mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PAY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_PAY ( pay_id, pay_amount, pay_method, pay_date, pay_status ) VALUES ( #{payId}, #{payAmount}, #{payMethod}, SYSDATE, #{payStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.PAY_ID AS payId, p.PAY_AMOUNT AS payAmount, p.PAY_METHOD AS payMethod, TO_CHAR(p.PAY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS payDate, p.PAY_STATUS AS payStatus FROM UB_PAY p JOIN UB_MATCHING m ON p.PAY_ID = m.PAY_ID WHERE m.MENTEE_NUMBER = #{memberNumber} ORDER BY p.PAY_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.PAY_ID AS payId, p.PAY_AMOUNT AS payAmount, p.PAY_METHOD AS payMethod, TO_CHAR(p.PAY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS payDate, p.PAY_STATUS AS payStatus, m.MATCHING_NUMBER AS matchingNumber, m.MENTEE_NUMBER AS memberNumber, u.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, u.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName FROM UB_PAY p JOIN UB_MATCHING m ON p.PAY_ID = m.PAY_ID JOIN UB_MEMBER u ON m.MENTEE_NUMBER = u.MEMBER_NUMBER WHERE m.MENTEE_NUMBER = #{memberNumber} ORDER BY p.PAY_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
